productDisplayName: Hanes Men ComfortSoft Pack of 2 Waistband Hip Briefs
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Style Note hanes knows how to deliver basics which are practical, comfortable and stylish. This brief is crafted using soft absorbent cotton fabric with duo-dry moisture management technology which helps the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch with ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic offers easy leg movement. Product Details Pack of two in black and grey Hip brief has ComfortSoft elastic waistband for a snug Fit, full back coverage and printed label on the inner back Material and Care 100% combed cotton Machine wash with like colours in warm water using a non chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron if needed The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
